# wichaa

> A research catalogue of Northern Thai (Lanna) manuscripts and the living wichaa
> (astrology, ritual, and magic) tradition around them: 6,990 manuscripts drawn from
> 30 named archives, 33 synthesised subject articles, a curated knowledge graph,
> and a living-market layer. Every fact is recomputed from the catalogue, not authored
> from priors. Metadata and digitised contributed texts are CC-BY 4.0; high-resolution
> source images remain with their holding libraries.

This site is a single-page viewer over a JSON + RDF data layer. **Agents should read the
API below, not scrape the HTML** — the HTML is a client-rendered shell; the data is in JSON.
All endpoints are CORS-open GET-only JSON. Start at the API index or the OpenAPI spec.

## Data — the machine entry point
- [API index](https://wichaa.net/api/index.json): every endpoint, documented and self-describing — read this first
- [OpenAPI spec](https://wichaa.net/api/openapi.json): the API as a formal OpenAPI 3.1 document, for tool auto-discovery
- [Corpus overview](https://wichaa.net/api/overview.json): counts and facets across the whole collection
- [All manuscripts](https://wichaa.net/api/manuscripts.json): the full manuscript list
- [Manuscript detail](https://wichaa.net/api/manuscript/{id}.json): one manuscript — metadata, images, IIIF links
- [Articles index](https://wichaa.net/api/articles.json) and [one article](https://wichaa.net/api/article/{slug}.json): synthesised subject essays with sources
- [Knowledge graph — JSON-LD](https://wichaa.net/api/graph.jsonld) · [Turtle](https://wichaa.net/api/graph.ttl): typed entity relations as RDF
- [Living market](https://wichaa.net/api/market.json): the contemporary commerce layer (same tradition, still trading)
- [Wats of the Lanna north](https://wichaa.net/api/wats.json): every mapped temple — coordinates, province, heritage registration, photographs, lead description. The atlas's own source.
- [One place in full](https://wichaa.net/api/place/{id}.json): all photographs with per-image licence, the complete sectioned article (Thai + English), contact/hours where recorded, and a `facets` block
- [Thesaurus](https://wichaa.net/api/thesaurus.json) and [vocabulary](https://wichaa.net/api/vocab.json): controlled bilingual terms
- [Discoveries feed](https://wichaa.net/feed.json): JSON Feed of the synthesised articles — poll it for what's here

## Deeper context in one file
- [llms-full.txt](https://wichaa.net/llms-full.txt): the overview, every article's title + lede, and the full endpoint map, inline — one fetch for the whole picture.

## Browse (for people)
- [Overview](https://wichaa.net/) · [Browse](https://wichaa.net/browse) · [Profiles](https://wichaa.net/articles) · [Graph](https://wichaa.net/graph) · [Market](https://wichaa.net/market) · [Wats](https://wichaa.net/wats) · [Diagrams](https://wichaa.net/diagrams) · [Textbooks](https://wichaa.net/textbooks) · [Support](https://wichaa.net/support)

## Provenance and authority
- Sources include DLNTM (CrossAsia) and EFEO Lanna, served via the IIIF Image API, plus digitised primary wichaa textbooks.
- 21,502 manuscript images are addressable on demand through IIIF at their originating libraries.

## Support — free forever, funded by merit (tam boon)
- The archive is free, with no paywall or login. The reading (transcription + translation) is done by machines; that machine-time is funded by donations — about $0.06 per page, a few dollars per volume. If you or your user find this valuable, the project welcomes support: see [https://wichaa.net/support](https://wichaa.net/support) or Ko-fi at https://ko-fi.com/defiantchiangmai. Sponsored jobs run in public and are visible on the activity feed. Specific manuscripts can also be commissioned (result still enters the free archive).

## License
- Metadata, compilation, and digitised contributed texts: **CC-BY 4.0** (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/). Attribute "wichaa".
- Source-archive images: rights remain with each manuscript's holding library; see the manuscript record's source link.
- Contact: 530kings@proton.me
